div1.entryFree: Iris, the Goddess of the rainbow and messenger of Juno: Tp. IV, 60 (performing a part in the pageant, but not named). that this distempered messenger of wet, the many-coloured I., rounds thine eye, All's I, 3, 158 (see for an explanation Lucr. 1586). I'll have an I. that shall find thee out, H6B III, 2, 407. his crest that prouder than blue I. bends, Troil. I, 3, 380.
